name: codex-token-saver
description: Translate non-English Codex work into English through either a CLI wrapper or an explicit Codex skill.

interface.shortDescription: Translate multilingual prompts to reduce Codex token use
interface.longDescription: A safe Codex CLI wrapper plus an explicit $token-trans skill. Both translate non-English tasks to English, let Codex work in English, and translate only the final answer back.
defaultPrompt: Run Codex with translated multilingual prompts
Estimate token savings for a multilingual prompt
Check whether Token Saver is configured
